title: Sonnet 5 (Fully Tested): IT UNDERPERFORMS GLM-5.2 and COSTS MORE!?
summary: AICodeKing tests Claude Sonnet 5 against competing models and finds it underperforms Opus and GLM-5.2 while costing more. The review cites poor real-world coding performance, weak benchmark results, and high pricing relative to alternatives. The author concludes Sonnet 5 is overpriced and less useful than competing models.
writeup: AICodeKing runs Claude Sonnet 5 through coding tasks and benchmarks, comparing it against Opus and GLM-5.2. The verdict: Sonnet 5 underperforms both while costing more, with weak real-world coding results and poor benchmark showings cited as evidence. The takeaway is that Sonnet 5 is overpriced relative to alternatives and less useful than GLM-5.2 for the same or lower cost.
